raspberry-vinegar.name: Raspberry Vinegar
instructions: Fill a clean pint jar with whole raspberries, pressing down slightly to fit in jar snugly. Add enough vinegar to cover raspberries. Cover mixture and let macerate at room temperature for 1 week.

Set a strainer over a medium bowl; line with a double layer of cheesecloth. Pour vinegar mixture through strainer. Gather corners of cheesecloth and twist to release juices just until thicker juices begin to strain from cheesecloth. Discard cheesecloth with solids. Pour vinegar into a clean 8-ounce bottle or jar. Cover; chill up to 6 months.

raspberry-peach-bellini-ice-pops.name: Raspberry-peach Bellini Ice Pops

ingredients.item: Prosecco or other sparkling white wine
Prosecco or other sparkling white wine
Thirty 2-ounce ice-pop molds and wooden sticks

instructions: Purée raspberries, Prosecco, sugar, and salt in a blender until very smooth. Pour 1 Tbsp. raspberry purée into each ice-pop mold (it won’t be very deep; only about ½–¾". You may not use all of it). Freeze while you make the peach purée.

Purée peaches, Prosecco, sugar, and salt in a blender until very smooth. Pour peach mixture over raspberry mixture to fill molds. Cover and insert sticks. Freeze until firm, at least 4 hours. Dip molds briefly in hot water to release pops. Do Ahead: Ice pops can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

ravioli-caprese-and-other-typical-pastas.name: Ravioli Caprese And Other Typical Pastas Of The Island Of Capri
ravioli-caprese-and-other-typical-pastas.original_name: Ravioli Caprese y otras pastas típicas de la isla de Capri

ingredients.item: 400 g de caciotta caprese semi-fresca (si no encuentras puedes sustituir por queso ricotta)
1/4 taza de hojas de albahaca fresca, picadas

instructions: We put the flour and salt as a volcano onto the work surface, we add hot water and we work it up to a soft mass. We make a ball and we let it stand and cover it.
Rallamos el parmesano y el queso caciotta en un recipiente, luego juntamos el queso ricotta y la mejorana picada y deshilachada. Mezclamos la masa y la ponemos en una manga pastelera.
We scattering the dough into two sheets or two strips if we're using a dough machine.
With his pastry sleeve, we distribute his padded to his pastry plate regularly with an amount equal to the size of a cherry.
Then we put the other plate of dough on them. We seal with our fingers the dough plate around the ravilis, with care to avoid air inside and then cut them with a specific cut.
Colocamos los raviolis espolvoreados con semolina en varios platos. Hervimos los raviolis en agua salada abundantemente y los sacamos del agua al primer hervor.

To prepare this ravioli sauce, in a frying pan, we heat olive oil with medium heat. We added the cherry tomatoes to the frying pan and cook them till they are soft and slightly caramelized, about 5-7 minutes. We add the fresh minced basil and have salt and pepper to taste. At the base of a plate, we put some tomato sauce, place ravilis and finally add more sauce with cherry tomatoes and some basil leaves.

raw-veggie-picnic-salad.name: Raw Veggie Picnic Salad
instructions: Place bacon in a skillet over medium heat, and cook until evenly brown and crisp, about 8 to 10 minutes. Drain, crumble, and set aside.

In a large bowl, toss together the bacon, broccoli, celery, peas, cranberries, green onions, green grapes, red grapes, and almonds. In a separate bowl, whisk together the sugar, salt, vinegar, grated onion, Parmesan cheese, and mayonnaise. Pour dressing over the salad. Gently toss to coat.

razor-soup-teleculinaria.name: Razor Soup
instructions: In a pot with the olive oil, praise the onion and chopped garlic. Add the previously minced naked tomato, tomato pulp, laurel leaf and shellfish broth. Season with salt and pepper, saute for 3 minutes, then add 1.2 l of water and let it boil.
Wash the linguine, add it to the previous broth and bake for 10 minutes. Remove from the broth, let it cool down a bit and discard the shells.
Descasque as batatas, corte-as em cubos, adicione-os ao tacho com o caldo e deixe cozer bem. Retifique os temperos e acrescente coentros picados a gosto.
Beat the eggs and add them to the soup, in yarn and always stirring. Take it off the fire and serve with the linguine kernel.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-stuffed-with-s.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs Stuffed With Spinach And Cheese
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-stuffed-with-s.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo rellenos de espinaca y queso

ingredients.item: 4  muslos de pollo deshuesados con piel
150 g cream or ricotta cheese ((you can also use mozzarella or Feta))

instructions: In a frying pan, heat up olive oil with medium heat.
Soak the chopped garlic till you release its smell, then add the spinach and cook for about 3 minutes till they are reduced.
Retire from the fire and mix with the cream cheese, peppermint to taste and add nutmeg if you wish. Let cool down.
Extiende los muslos de pollo deshuesados con la piel hacia abajo.
Put a portion of the pilling at the centre of every thigh.
Wrap up every thigh and tie it with kitchen thread or check with chopsticks to avoid opening while cooking.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper and sweet peppermint.
In a large frying pan, heats olive oil and dors his thighs from all sides till his skin's crispy.
Transfiere los muslos a una bandeja para hornear.
Add chicken stock and white wine. Hornea at 180 been 3 been for 25-30 minutes.
Retira del horno y deja reposar 5 minutos antes de servir.

recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-.name: Recipes For Grilled Chicken Breasts with Sautéed Mushrooms
recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-.original_name: Receta de pechugas de pollo a la plancha con setas salteadas

ingredients.item: 2   pechugas de pollo (aprox. 150 g cada una)
1 cda de aceite de oliva ( virgen extra)
200 g of fresh and varied mushrooms (portobello, shiitake, white mushrooms or enoki)
1 cdita de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)
Un chorrito de vino blanco seco  ((opcional))
1 cdita de mantequilla ((opcional, para darle un toque gourmet))

instructions: In a bowl, mix the lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, pepper and peppermint. Fits well the breasts and let rest for at least 10 minutes to enhance the taste.
Clean the mushrooms with a damp cloth or a kitchen brush. Cut them into sheets if they're big.

In a hot frying pan with olive oil, scattering garlic till golden, add mushrooms and cook with medium-high heat for 6-8 minutes. Add salt and pepper and white wine if you decide to use them. It removes till the mushrooms are tender and slightly golden. It ends with a touch of butter and fresh parsley.
Warm an anti-stick plate or frying pan with medium-high heat. Cooking the breasts for 4-5 minutes per side or until they are well golden and cooked from inside.
He employs his breasts and goes with his mushrooms above or next door. You can add some drops of lemon juice and a slice of parsley to decorate.

recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-vegetabl.name: Recipe For Peppers Stuffed With Vegetables
recipe-for-peppers-stuffed-with-vegetabl.original_name: Receta de pimientos rellenos de verduras
instructions: Corta la parte superior de los pimientos y retira el tallo y las semillas. Lava muy bien y reserva.
Peel the onion and cut into thin strips, make your own with green pepper. Fish his garlic teeth and snap his mushrooms.
Corta en cubos los tomates.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
In a frying pan, add some olive oil and hot.
When hot, add your garlic teeth and onion. Fold for a few minutes.
Add mushrooms and Saxony with salt, pepper and provenous herbs. Mix and cook for 4 more minutes.
Agrega los tomates, mezcla y cocina a fuego medio hasta que tengas un sofrito jugoso.
Rellena los pimientos y esparce el queso mozzarella rallado.
Baked for about 15 minutes or till the pepper's soft and the cheese's been chewed.
Retira del horno y disfruta.

recipe-for-squid-en-papillote-step-by-st.name: Recipe For Squid En Papillote Step By Step.
recipe-for-squid-en-papillote-step-by-st.original_name: Receta de calamares en papillote paso a paso.

ingredients.item: 500 gr de calamares  (limpios y cortados en anillas)

instructions: We start our recipe by pressurizing the oven at 200 been 3.
Coloca una hoja de papel pergamino o papel aluminio en una bandeja para horno.
En un bol, mezcla los calamares, tomates, cebolla, pimiento y ajo. Riega con aceite de oliva, sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Redistribute the mixture at the centre of each scroll paper sheet and close them into well sealed packages.
Hornea los calamares con los otros ingredientes por 20 minutos. Una vez listo, retira del horno y deja reposar unos cinco minutos antes de servir.

recipe-for-tomatoes-stuffed-with-baked-r.name: Recipe For Tomatoes Stuffed With Baked Rice: Step By Step
recipe-for-tomatoes-stuffed-with-baked-r.original_name: Receta de tomates rellenos de arroz al horno: paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 taza de arroz arborio o basmati
1/2 taza de queso feta o parmesano rallado
2 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)

instructions: Cut up the top of the tomatoes and save them as a cover.
With a spoon, empty your pulp and put it into a bowl, making sure you don't drill your tomato skin.
Tight the pulp slightly and pass it through a pallet to remove some of the liquid. Reserve.
In a frying pan, heats olive oil with medium heat and pits onion and garlic till tender.
Add the rice and remove for a few minutes to absorb the flavors.
It incorporates a reserved tomato pulp, hot vegetable stock, oregano, cumin and paprika. Cooking at medium heat till the rice is nearly ready (about 12 minutes), stirring occasionally.
Remove from the fire and add cheese, olives, capers, steamed almonds and minced parsley. Meg well and tighten with salt and pepper.
Rellena los tomates con la mezcla de arroz, sin presionar demasiado.
Place the tomato tops and place them on a previously frosted oven plate.
Hornea at 180 been 3 been (177 been 3 been) for 25 to 30 minutes, until the tomatoes are tender and slightly golden.
Deja reposar por unos minutos antes de servir caliente.

recipe-to-prepare-chia-pudding-comedera.name: Recipe To Prepare Chia Pudding
recipe-to-prepare-chia-pudding-comedera.original_name: Receta para preparar pudín de chía

ingredients.item: 1 vaso leche de leche vegetal  ((coco, arroz, almendras, avena o soya))
1 few red fruits (or fruit of your choice)

instructions: Put the cheesy with the milk in a package that you can cover
Revuelve con la miel
Deja reposar en el refrigerador al menos dos horas
Agrega los frutos rojos

red-beans-with-lentils-lezzet.name: Red Beans With Lentils
instructions: 1. Extract the Barbunia and sprinkle in the consistency of the water with lemon.
2. Hurricane 5 minutes.
3. Replace the water and sprinkle in the consistency of the salty water.
4. Remove the lentilm with beans from the drain pan.
5. Clean and chop fresh onions.
6. Clean and off Maydanosu.
7. Clean and chop the pepper.
8. Onion, salcha pepper, sugar, hot water, oil and salt lentilized beans and close the cover of the pot.
9. 15-20 minutes to cook and cool.
10. Add and mix the parley and serve.
11. 11. You can also try olive oil barbunya recipe.

red-shoe-diary.name: Red Shoe Diary
instructions: Shake honey and 1½ tsp. hot water in a jar until honey is dissolved. Muddle 1 blood orange wheel in a cocktail shaker. Add vermouth, Pisco, Campari and honey syrup; fill shaker with ice and stir until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into coupe glasses. Cut remaining half of blood orange wheel in half and garnish cocktails.

ricotta-and-clementines-with-date-vinaig.name: Ricotta And Clementines With Date Vinaigrette
instructions: Remove pits from 2 dates. Slice in half lengthwise, then thinly slice. Transfer to a small bowl.
Slice 2 clementines in half crosswise. Pick out any exposed seeds and discard. Peel 2 halves, then separate into segments.
Using a fork or citrus reamer, juice remaining halves over sliced dates; season with salt and pepper and toss.
Mix 8 oz. ricotta, 1 tsp. salt, and ½ tsp. pepper in another small bowl. Smear across a serving plate.
Scatter clementine segments over ricotta. Top with a small handful of arugula.
Spoon date dressing over, then drizzle with oil. Serve with bread alongside.

rigatoni-cake-argiro.name: Rigatoni Cake

ingredients.item: 1/2 to 3/4 cup of cephalogravier or cephalotyr
1 cup grated yellow cheeses or grated mozzarella
1/2 to 3/4 cup of cephalogravier or cephalotyr
1 cup grated yellow cheeses or grated mozzarella

instructions: Clean the sausage first from the casing and grind it into the blender or chop it like minced meat.
Heat the olive oil in a pan and we Wash the sauce for 2′, add the onion and let it become transparent.
Add the carrot and eggplant and mix them to wither lightly.
Finally, add the tomatoes.
Simmer for 15′ and simmer at the end, simmer if you want with parsley, oregano, thyme or leave it straight.
Boil the Rigatoni for 7′-8′ in salted water. Don't boy themm more or they'll melt and not be filled.
Drain well in a colander and pour them with some olive oil shoulder.
Mix well and sprinkle them with the grated kefalotiri, so that the cheese sticks everywhere.
We pay very good ring form 27 cm.
Dress the pan with aluminum foil and touch it in a baking pan (there is a chance that the sauce will run around with baking).
Place the pan sideways and start and fill with the boiled rigatoni, placing them vertically, i.e. standing in the form, one glued to the other.
In the end, after we've finished and filled all the form, we'll only see the holes in the pasta.
Pour with the sauce and with a straw, insert the pieces of the sauce into the rigatoni, to fill the dough hole up. Pour the surface with the rest of the sauce.
Bake in a preheated ocean at 200oC for 15′ and sprinkle the whole surface with the Melted cheeses or mozzarella pieces.
Add the cheeses to the surface and make a light crust.
Allow it to cool on the counter so it doesn't dissolve. We're going around the shape of a knife's blade to get off the hook, and we're going to be careful.
Serve on a platter and cut with a sharp knife into triangle pieces like cake.

rigatoni-with-spicy-calabrese-style-pork.name: Rigatoni With Spicy Calabrese-style Pork Ragù

ingredients.item: Finely grated parmesan or grana padano

instructions: Pulse onion, carrot, celery, garlic, oregano, red pepper flakes, and 1/4 cup parsley in a food processor until finely chopped; transfer to a small bowl and set aside. Purée tomatoes with juices in processor; set aside.

Heat oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat; add sausage and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until browned, about 4 minutes. Add ground pork, season with salt and pepper, and cook, breaking up with a spoon, until no longer pink. Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a plate.
Increase heat to medium-high. Add reserved vegetable mixture to drippings in pot, season with salt, and cook, stirring often, until golden, 8-10 minutes.

Stir tomato paste and 1 cup water in a small bowl; add to pot. Cook, scraping up any browned bits from bottom of pot. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until liquid has almost evaporated, 6-8 minutes.

Add reserved meat and tomato purée and 1 cup water. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, adding more water as needed to keep meat nearly submerged, until meat is tender, about 4 hours. Season with salt.
Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid.

Add pasta and 1/2 cup pasta cooking liquid to sauce; stir to coat. Stir in 3/4 cup Parmesan and remaining 1/4 cup parsley. Increase heat to medium and continue stirring, adding more pasta cooking liquid as needed, until sauce coats pasta. Divide among bowls; top with more Parmesan.
Do Ahead: Ragù can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool. Cover and chill, or freeze for up to 2 months. Reheat before using.

roast-boneless-leg-of-lamb.name: Roast Boneless Leg Of Lamb
instructions: Cut 20 deep slits evenly spaced around the leg of lamb without cutting the netting. Stuff one garlic clove into each slit.
Rub garlic powder over lamb. Slice rosemary sprigs; place under the netting evenly around lamb. Transfer lamb to a roasting pan.
Roast lamb in the preheated oven until pink and juicy in the center for medium, about 2 to 2 ½ hours. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 54°C (54 degrees C).
Remove from the oven and cover with aluminum foil; lest rest until thermometer reads 57°C (57 degrees C) before carving, about 20 minutes.

roast-chicken-with-crispy-potatoes-and-s.name: Roast Chicken With Crispy Potatoes And Salsa Verde

ingredients.item: Flat-leaf parsley leaves with tender stems

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°. Set chicken in a 12” cast-iron skillet and rub all over with 1 Tbsp. olive oil. Season generously with salt and pepper. Insert lemon halves into chicken cavity. Tie legs together with kitchen twine.

Roast chicken in oven until skin is golden brown and crisp all over and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of breast registers 160°, 60–80 minutes. Let chicken rest in skillet at least 15 minutes and up to 45 minutes before transferring to a cutting board and carving.

Blend herbs, vinegar, shallot, jalapeño, garlic, and ¾ cup oil in a blender until mixture is still slightly chunky and you can still see flecks of herbs. Transfer salsa verde to a small bowl and season with salt.

Set air fryer to 400°. Toss potatoes with 2 Tbsp. oil and season with salt and pepper. Add potatoes to air fryer basket and cook for 12-15 minutes, tossing every 5 minutes, until golden brown and crisp.
Transfer carved chicken to a platter and arrange potatoes around. Serve with salsa verde.

roast-turkey-with-wild-rice-teleculinari.name: Roast Turkey With Wild Rice
instructions: Coloque o peito de peru num tabuleiro, tempere com sal, pimenta, alecrim, salsa picada, os dentes de alho picados, o sumo de 1 laranja, o azeite e o vinho branco e envolva bem.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 160oC, for about an hour. After 30 minutes, add to the board the peeled onions and garlic heads cut in half.
However, it cooks rice in abundant water seasoned with salt for about 15 minutes. Remove, drain and reserve.

Remove the meat from the oven, fatigue and dispose on a platter, as well as onions and garlic heads. Water with your own sauce, decorate with orange, pre-cooked until browned, and pomegranate and serve with the cooked wild rice.

roasted-apple-and-cinnamon-puree-an-and-.name: Roasted Apple And Cinnamon Puree: An And Delicious Dessert
roasted-apple-and-cinnamon-puree-an-and-.original_name: Puré de manzana asada y canela: un postre fácil y rico

ingredients.item: 3  manzanas medianas ( (tipo reineta, golden o fuji))
2 cdas de nata  ( (crema para batir o crema espesa))
2 cds of brown sugar ((1 per portion))

instructions: Wash the apples, remove the hearts if you wish, and place them whole in an oven plate.
Roast them at 200 ″ 3 ″ for 30 minutes till they are soft and their skin has been damaged.

Once out of the oven and still tibia, hit them and put his pulp into a bowl. Triture with a fork or mixer up to get a smooth purée. It incorporates the 2 tablespoons of cream and the tablespoon of cinnamon. Mix well till everything's integrated and texture's creamy.

Divide purée into two plates. Sprinkle a tablespoon of brown sugar onto each portion and caramelish with a kitchen blow or under the oven plate for a few minutes till the sugar is fraked and a crisp cape forms.

roasted-beets-carrots-and-jerusalem-arti.name: Roasted Beets, Carrots, And Jerusalem Artichokes With Lemon And The Greenest Tahini Sauce
instructions: INGREDIENT INFO: Jerusalem artichokes are sold at farmers’ markets and in the produce section of some supermarkets. Aleppo pepper, a slightly sweet Syrian pepper with a moderate heat level, is available at some specialty foods stores and wholespice.com.

Preheat oven to 425°. Toss beets with 1 Tbsp. oil on a lightly oiled rimmed baking sheet; arrange in a single layer and season with salt and black pepper. Roast 20 minutes, then turn over wedges and continue to roast until beets are tender and darkened around the edges, about 30 minutes total.

Toss carrots with 1 Tbsp. oil on one half of a lightly oiled rimmed baking sheet. Toss Jerusalem artichokes with 1 Tbsp. oil on the other half of the baking sheet. Arrange carrots and Jerusalem artichokes in a single layer, season with salt and black pepper, and roast until vegetables are lightly browned, about 20 minutes.

Toss all the warm roasted vegetables together with lemon zest, ¼ tsp. Aleppo pepper, and 1 tsp. lemon juice. Season with salt, Aleppo pepper, and lemon juice. Reserve 1 cup vegetables for Quinoa and Roasted Vegetable Salad.
Toss watercress with remaining 1 Tbsp. olive oil and 1 tsp. lemon juice; season to taste with salt and black pepper. Serve roasted vegetables with dressed watercress and tahini sauce.

roasted-brussels-sprouts-with-gochujang-.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts With Gochujang Brown Butter
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and set a rimmed baking sheet on each; preheat oven to 500°. Toss brussels sprouts with oil in a large bowl to coat; season with kosher salt and pepper. Carefully (baking sheets will be hot!) divide brussels sprouts between baking sheets and spread out in a single layer; reserve bowl. Roast, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until brussels sprouts are charred in spots and tender, 16–18 minutes.
Meanwhile, if using walnuts, toast in a dry medium skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until fragrant and slightly darkened, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and let cool.

Cook butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, swirling occasionally, until milk solids are a deep amber color and butter smells very nutty, 5–8 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in gochujang and maple syrup. Season with kosher salt and pepper.

Combine brussels sprouts, half of walnuts, and half of scallions in reserved bowl; add brown butter mixture and toss to coat. Transfer to a platter and scatter remaining walnuts and scallions over. Finely grate lemon zest on top; sprinkle with sea salt.

roasted-garlic-parmesan-potatoes.name: Roasted Garlic Parmesan Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
Cut potatoes in half, then slice.
Place the potatoes in a large bowl. Drizzle olive oil and toss to coat.
In a small bowl, mix salt, garlic powder, Italian seasoning, and paprika.
Sprinkle seasoning on potatoes and toss to coat.
Spread the potatoes on a baking sheet.
Bake for 30 minutes.
Remove from the oven, sprinkle with parmesan and pepper.
Bake for an additional 20 minutes.
Sprinkle potatoes with fresh parsley and serve while hot.
Enjoy!

roasted-potato-bread.name: Roasted Potato Bread

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tsp. distilled white or apple cider vinegar

instructions: Lightly coat an 8½x4½” loaf pan with nonstick spray. Place ¾ cup (160 g) cold water in the bowl of a stand mixer; sprinkle with yeast and let sit until creamy, about 5 minutes.

Meanwhile, whisk potato flour and 3½ cups (500 g) all-purpose flour in a medium bowl to remove lumps. Add flours and buttermilk to yeast mixture and mix on low speed with dough hook, increasing speed to medium as dough stiffens and comes together, about 5 minutes.
Turn out dough onto a clean surface and knead until a smooth ball forms. Transfer to a large bowl and let sit 15 minutes to relax.
Pull apart dough into several pieces and return to stand-mixer bowl. Add vinegar and salt and mix on low speed with dough hook until dough is smooth, stretchy, and no longer sticky, 5–8 minutes.

With motor running, add butter 2 pieces at a time, scraping down sides of bowl as needed and mixing until incorporated before adding more, about 4 minutes between additions. Increase speed to medium and mix until dough starts to come away from sides of bowl and forms a ball, about 5 minutes longer.
Transfer dough to a lightly floured bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Let sit at room temperature 30 minutes to relax.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface. Stretch an edge up and over to the opposite side of dough. Repeat 3 times, working your way around dough. Flip dough over, return to bowl, and cover with plastic wrap. Chill until doubled in size, 18–24 hours.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and gently pat out larger air bubbles with floured hands. Fold sides of dough inward to make a 7”-long rectangle. Pat and tuck dough into a rough cylinder and place, seam side down, into prepared pan. (Make sure seam is dead center; it will help keep finished loaf from being lopsided and prevent it from splitting.)
Let dough rise until outside edges have risen just above pan, 4–6 hours.

Heat oven to 500°. Brush dough with milk. Using a wooden skewer or toothpick, very gently prick loaf 8–10 times evenly across surface, popping any larger bubbles. Place pan in oven and reduce oven temperature to 425°. Bake until bread is deep golden brown, 50–60 minutes. Remove pan from oven, gently ease bread from pan and return to oven, placing directly on rack. Bake until sides are firm but not hard, 10–15 minutes longer.
Transfer bread to a wire rack and let cool completely before slicing (this may prove impossible, but try).
DO AHEAD: Bread can be baked 4 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

roasted-stuffed-squash-blossoms.name: Roasted Stuffed Squash Blossoms

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a pan over medium heat; add garlic and cook for 1 minute. Stir in chard and cook until soft, about 10 minutes. Add basil, salt, and pepper, and cook until basil is soft, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool completely, about 15 minutes. Place cooled chard mixture between 2 towels and press to remove excess moisture.

Stir goat cheese and chard mixture together in a bowl until thoroughly combined. Fill zucchini blossoms about 3/4 full with the goat cheese mixture, and pinch the ends closed. Place filled blossoms in a roasting pan; drizzle with 2 tablespoons olive oil, and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven until squash blossoms are hot, about 10 minutes.

roasted-sweet-potatoes-with-garlic-and-c.name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes With Garlic And Chile

ingredients.item: Garnet yams or other sweet potatoes

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Toss yams with oil on a rimmed baking sheet and arrange in a single layer; season with ½ tsp. salt. Roast until tender and browned in spots, 35–40 minutes. Remove from oven; while still hot, toss potatoes with hot chili sauce and garlic. Season with salt.

rosemary-and-toasted-caraway-shortbread.name: Rosemary And Toasted-caraway Shortbread
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast caraway seeds in a small dry skillet over medium-high heat, tossing occasionally, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Coarsely chop; set aside.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, granulated sugar, powdered sugar, and salt until very light and fluffy, 7–10 minutes (beating air into butter makes for tender shortbread). Reduce speed to low and add flour, caraway, and 2 tsp. chopped rosemary; mix just to combine. Dough will look shaggy and a little dry (it’s not!).
Press dough into two 8”-diameter cake pans. Brush with egg, sprinkle with sanding sugar, and top with rosemary leaves.
Bake until shortbread is golden brown and sides pull away from pan, 20–25 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack; let cool in pan before turning out and cutting into wedges or bars.
DO AHEAD: Shortbread dough can be made 1 month ahead; wrap tightly and freeze. Shortbread can be baked 1 week ahead; store wrapped tightly at room temperature.

rosettes.name: Rosettes
instructions: Beat eggs, sugar, and salt together in a large bowl. Add flour, milk, and vanilla extract; beat until smooth.
Heat about 2 inches of oil in a large, deep skillet to 191°C (190 degrees C). Place a wire rack over paper towels.
Heat the rosette iron in hot oil for 2 minutes. Lift the iron and let excess oil drain. Dip the iron in batter to 1/4 inch from the top of the iron, then dip the iron immediately into hot oil.
Fry rosette in hot oil until crisp and lightly golden, about 30 seconds.
Lift the iron out; tip upside down to drain. Use a fork to push rosette off the iron onto the prepared wire rack.
Reheat the iron in hot oil for 1 minute; cook remaining batter. Sprinkle rosettes with confectioners' sugar.
Enjoy!

rosti-with-bacon-and-scallions.name: Rösti With Bacon And Scallions

ingredients.item: Smoked salt or kosher salt plus more
Ingredient info: smoked salt can be found at specialty stores and saltworks.us.

instructions: Cook bacon in a small nonstick skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until most of fat is rendered and bacon begins to brown, about 5 minutes. Set 1 tablespoon of dark-green part of scallions aside. Add remaining scallions to skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until bacon is crisp and scallions are soft, 4-5 minutes longer. Using a slotted spoon, transfer bacon mixture to a paper towel-lined plate.

Pour bacon fat into a small bowl; reserve skillet. Add olive oil to bowl to measure 3 tablespoons Add butter. Place 2 tablespoons fat mixture in skillet. Pour 2 tablespoons into another bowl; add bacon mixture. Reserve remaining 2 tablespoons in small bowl.

Coarsely grate potatoes into a large bowl. Working in batches, squeeze potatoes with your hands to release liquid; transfer to another large bowl. Add the reserved bacon mixture, 1 teaspoon salt, and pepper; toss to evenly distribute.

Heat reserved skillet over medium-low heat. Scrape potato mixture into hot skillet, pressing with a spatula into an even layer. Tent with foil; cook for 10 minutes, rotating skillet frequently to avoid hot spots. Remove foil; cook rösti until bottom is golden brown, about 5 minutes longer. Run a silicone spatula around sides and underneath rösti. Invert a large plate over skillet. Using oven mitts, carefully flip rösti onto plate.

Heat remaining 2 tablespoons fat in skillet. Slide rösti back in, browned side up. Tent with foil; cook for 5 minutes. Uncover; cook until browned on bottom and potatoes are cooked through, about 10 minutes longer. Gently run spatula around sides and underneath rösti and slide onto a serving plate. Sprinkle with reserved scallions and season with more salt, if desired.

runner-beans-with-swiss-chard-stems-and-.name: Runner Beans With Swiss Chard Stems And Basil

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add runner beans and Swiss chard stems, season with salt and pepper, and cook, tossing often, until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Transfer runner bean mixture to a large bowl and toss with green beans, basil, vinegar, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil; season with salt, pepper, and more vinegar, if desired.
